news.headline: FedEx stock drops after revising 2025 profit outlook. Company reported lower earnings and revenue for Q3.
news.summary: After the market closed on Thursday, FedEx disclosed its fiscal third-quarter earnings and revenue. The company revealed a revision in its 2025 profit outlook to a lower level. Following this update, FedEx stock experienced a decline. The details behind this reduction in profit expectations were not provided.

news.headline: Trump plans to award $20 billion fighter jet contract to either Lockheed Martin or Boeing.
news.summary: On Friday, President Trump may be granting a $20 billion contract for a next-generation fighter jet. Lockheed Martin and Boeing are the main contenders for the contract. This move by Trump has set up a competition between Lockheed and Boeing for the lucrative deal.

news.headline: Stock market unsure, bull-bear clash. Focus on Fed's Powell, Nvidia, rally unconfirmed. Mixed sentiment.
news.summary: By Friday morning, the stock market showed a mixed performance with no confirmed rally attempt yet. The market was characterized by a battle for control between stock market bulls and bears. Key highlights were an optimistic statement from Federal Reserve Chairman Powell and the impact of Nvidia GTC. The market's trajectory for the week was discussed in a review but remains uncertain. This information was shared in a weekly overview by Investor's Business Daily, covering the latest updates and trends.

news.headline: Alnylam stock surged after winning second FDA approval for drug Amvuttra, setting up battle with Pfizer, BridgeBio.
news.summary: On Friday, Alnylam's stock saw a significant increase following the announcement of their second FDA approval for their drug, Amvuttra. This approval propels Alnylam into a new battle with Pfizer and BridgeBio. The post by Investor's Business Daily highlighted Alnylam's positive development in the pharmaceutical industry.

news.headline: IonQ's chair advises against shorting Nvidia due to quantum computing. IonQ stock rose post Nvidia's Quantum Day.
news.summary: The executive chairman of IonQ advised against betting against Nvidia, stating it is a risky move. Following Nvidia's Quantum Day, IonQ's stock experienced a rise. The message from IonQ's executive chairman discouraging the shorting of Nvidia due to their advancements in quantum computing was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

Carnival Cruise's Q1 profit soars with sales growth of 7.5% to $5.81B and passenger ticket sales up 5.9% to $3.8B. Operating income surged 96.7% YoY to $543M.
news.summary: Carnival Corp (NYSE:CCL) saw a decline in shares as it released first-quarter FY25 earnings results. The company experienced a 7.5% increase in sales to $5.81 billion, surpassing the estimated $5.75 billion. Passenger ticket sales also rose by 5.9% to $3.8 billion, while adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at 13 cents, exceeding the anticipated 2 cents. The average lower berth day reached 23.6 million, with an impressive 103% occupancy percentage. Net yields were up by 7.3% compared to the previous year, and cruise costs per ALBD decreased by 0.3%. Operating income surged by 96.7% year-on-year to $543 million, with adjusted EBITDA hitting $1.2 billion in the quarter.

news.headline: Planet selected as subcontractor for $95M California Satellite Data Purchase Program, focusing on methane data for CARB.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL), a prominent provider of daily Earth change data, revealed it secured the main subcontractor role for the California Air Resource Board’s (CARB) Satellite Data Purchase Program (SDPP). The lucrative contract worth $95 million spans multiple years and was granted to Carbon Mapper, with Planet as the subcontractor. Their responsibilities include supplying California with methane data derived from Tanager hyperspectral collections and other data products from Planet.

news.headline: 1890 Initiative & Ensign Beverage Co. team up launching new cold brew to support NIL initiatives for student-athletes.
news.summary: A company based in Lincoln, Nebraska called The 1890 Initiative, LLC, which focuses on supporting student-athletes in the state to leverage name, image, and likeness (NIL) opportunities, has revealed an extension in its collaboration with Ensign, a local brewing partner. This development aims to further enhance opportunities for student-athletes in Nebraska.

news.headline: TCBP to transition from Nasdaq to OTC Markets, focusing on allogeneic gamma-delta T cell therapies for cancer.
news.summary: Edinburgh, Scotland - March 21, 2025 - TC BioPharm (Holdings) PLC, a leading clinical-stage biotech firm (NASDAQ: TCBP), revealed its latest advancements. The company specializes in developing allogeneic gamma-delta T cell therapies for cancer and various other medical conditions. Today, TC BioPharm shared that...

news.headline: Inventor from Bakersfield develops FRO-580 desalination system in Pittsburg, aiming to purify water on consumer & utility level.
news.summary: Inventor from Bakersfield, Calif., unveils new water distillation system, the DISTILATOR M A R, with the aim of purifying water for consumers and utilities. The innovative system is designed to be modular and the inventor believes it could revolutionize water purification processes. The invention was revealed in Pittsburgh on March 21, 2025, with high hopes of addressing water quality issues. The DISTILATOR M A R is expected to enhance water purification efficiency and potentially cater to a wide range of users across different sectors.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: Ukraine is ready to act in fast and concrete way at talks in Jeddah on Monday.
US Treasury reverses 2022 decision to sanction Tornado Cash, Ethereum mixer service.
news.summary: The popular Ethereum coin mixing service Tornado Cash has recently been granted permission by the U.S. Treasury, overturning a previous decision made in 2022. This decision comes as a relief to many users, as the service provides a crucial layer of privacy to transactions involving Ethereum. This change in stance reflects a shift towards accommodating the evolving needs of users, with the service benefiting from enhanced legitimacy and acceptance. It marks a significant development in the crypto space, considering the service's impact and usage among investors and traders globally.

Segway's 2025 APAC & MET Distributors' Conference in Istanbul unites partners from Asia, focusing on innovation.
news.summary: Unveiling the Next Chapter of Innovation and Growth in Istanbul on March 21, 2025, Segway concluded its annual APAC & MET Distributors’ Conference held from March 12 to March 14, 2025. The event took place in Istanbul and saw the participation of essential partners from the Asia-Pacific region.

news.headline: MY SALON Suite to exhibit at 25th Annual Franchising Conference in Carrollton, Texas on March 21st. Opportunity for  franchise growth and innovation showcased. #FranchiseGrowth #Innovation #Conference
news.summary: Guests have the opportunity to delve into MY SALON Suite franchise options, engage with industry specialists, and learn about the newest brand enhancements in CARROLLTON, TX on March 21, 2025. MY SALON Suite®, a salon suite franchise that caters to beauty, health, and wellness professionals, will be showcasing its latest refinements at the event.

New campaign tackles overdose disparities among Black communities, launching March 26, 2025 in 7 cities. #Naloxone #SaveLives
news.summary: On March 26, 2025, a virtual press conference will be held to debut the "You Have the Power to Save Lives Campaign," aiming to raise awareness about Naloxone. This initiative is supported by a collective of Black community influencers, government representatives, and healthcare professionals from seven cities. The conference will address the pressing issue of opioid overdoses and the importance of Naloxone in saving lives. Members of the media are encouraged to attend this significant event.

By 2032, the Automotive 3D Printing Market is projected to reach $17.9 billion as per a new research report.
news.summary: In Redding, California, a recent market research report released on March 21, 2025, reveals insights on the Automotive 3D Printing Market. The report covers various aspects such as offerings (including hardware and services), technologies like Fused Deposition Modeling and Stereo Lithography, components focusing on interior and exterior parts, and different vehicle types. The study delves into applications of 3D printing in the automotive industry. The report highlights key trends and market dynamics, providing valuable information for industry players and stakeholders.

news.headline: Kalahari Resorts commits $50 million to charity: water for clean water projects; $7 million donated, served 167,000+.
news.summary: In Wisconsin Dells, Kalahari Resorts & Conventions renews its commitment to tackling the global water crisis on World Water Day (March 22). Through its partnership with charity: water, the company pledges $50 million to provide clean, safe drinking water to one million individuals in Africa. With nearly $7 million contributed so far, Kalahari has supported over 620 water initiatives in nine countries, benefiting more than 167,000 people.

news.headline: Capstone Partners promotes Crista Gilmore to Managing Director in Building Products & Construction Services Group.
news.summary: In Boston on March 21, 2025, Capstone Partners, a prominent middle market investment banking firm, announced the promotion of Crista Gilmore to Managing Director in the Building Products & Construction Services Group. This significant development marks Gilmore's advancement within the company, underscoring her expertise and leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Inventor from Riviera Beach, Fla. creates COVERED, a new windshield accessory to protect against rain and snow while traveling.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 21, 2025, an inventor from Riviera Beach, Florida shared the inspiration behind creating a new vehicle accessory. His creation, named the COVERED, offers protection for the front windshield from rain or snow during travel. The inventor expressed his motivation to address the challenges posed by varying weather conditions. This innovative design aims to shield the windshield, enhancing safety and visibility for drivers.

news.headline: Blanchard wins 2025 Top Workplaces USA award from Energage for excellence in leadership development.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, in San Diego, Blanchard®, a leader in leadership development and coaching for over 45 years, was honored with a Top Workplaces USA 2025 award by Energage. Energage, an organization focused on developing branding solutions, acknowledged Blanchard® for its outstanding workplace environment.

news.headline: US Healthcare Analytics Market to hit US$47.40 billion by 2029, with 24.5% CAGR growth from US$15.84 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of March 21, 2025, the worldwide US Healthcare Analytics Market had a value of US$15.84 billion in 2024. It is anticipated to experience substantial growth with a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 24.5%, potentially hitting US$47.40 billion by 2029.
